title: erodium sanguis-christi
intro: Erodium sanguis-christi, also known as the Red-stemmed Stork's-bill, is a plant species that belongs to the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Erodium sanguis-christi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusate, or used to make a decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
